events.text: Match ends, Argentinos Juniors 1, Sarmiento 0.
Second Half ends, Argentinos Juniors 1, Sarmiento 0.

Attempt saved. Carlos Villalba (Sarmiento) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Brayan Cortés (Argentinos Juniors). Assisted by Brandon Márquez with a headed pass.
Tomás Molina (Argentinos Juniors) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Goal! Argentinos Juniors 1, Sarmiento 0. Tomás Molina (Argentinos Juniors) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Leandro Lozano with a cross.
